data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for category tagging.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the category tagging functionality (cosmetic, functional, safety), but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The only related evidence is a summary of the use case, which does not demonstrate actual implementation or validation of the requirement. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for category tagging.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the category tagging requirement.
